name: Job scan applies filters and offers JD save
prompt: Scan for job openings for me. My vault is at ~/Documents/vault. Agent folder is headhunter.

vault_state.raw/profile.md:
seniority_floor: Senior
salary_floor_local: 120000
geography: Mexico City or remote
exclusions:
  - [ACME Corp]
target_roles:
  - Investment Product Strategy
  - Index Portfolio Manager
vault_state.wiki/pipeline.md:
# Pipeline
| Firm | Role | Status | Applied | Last update | Channel | CV code | Contact | JD saved | Notes |

expected_behavior: Skill reads profile.md filters before searching. Presents results as a scored table (Firm | Role | Fit Score | Why it fits | Channel | Notes). Does not show excluded firms. Flags roles with unlisted salary. After presenting results, offers to save full JDs and log to pipeline. Does not log anything without user confirmation.
assertions: reads seniority_floor, salary_floor, geography, exclusions from profile.md before any search
drops excluded firms from results without surfacing them
output is a table with columns: Firm, Role, Fit Score, Why it fits, Channel, Notes
offers to save JD for each role the user expresses interest in
asks before adding anything to pipeline.md
does not modify any file without explicit yes

name: CV tailor produces diff and confirms before writing
prompt: Tailor my CV for the Senior Analyst role at Meridian Asset Management.

vault_state.raw/experience-bank.md: [populated with sample roles, bullets, framing rules]
vault_state.wiki/cv-strategy.md:
## Version Registry
| Code | Sector | Status | Last updated |
| A | Asset Management | approved | 2026-03-01 |

## Sector rules — Asset Management
- Lead with index/portfolio analytics
- Emphasize institutional client coverage
- Use quantified outcomes
vault_state.wiki/jd-log/meridian-senior-analyst-2026:
Role: Senior Analyst
Firm: Meridian Asset Management
Requirements: 5+ years index or portfolio analytics, Python, client-facing...

expected_behavior: Skill loads the JD from jd-log/ automatically. Reads experience-bank.md and cv-strategy.md A-code rules. Outputs a per-section diff (current → proposed). Marks any JD requirements not covered in experience-bank as [MISSING]. Asks before writing cv-strategy.md session log. Offers ATS review after.
assertions: loads JD from jd-log/ without asking user to paste it
reads experience-bank.md and sector rules from cv-strategy.md
output shows current content vs proposed content as a diff
marks uncovered JD requirements as [MISSING]
does not add unverified facts to any content
asks 'Update cv-strategy.md to log this session?' before writing
offers ATS review after output

name: Draft outreach respects 300-char limit and requires approval
prompt: Draft a LinkedIn message to Sarah Kim at Vanguard.

vault_state.raw/firms-contacts.md:
## Vanguard
Tier: 2
### Sarah Kim
Title: Director, Product Strategy
Relationship: met at CFA event 2025
Last contact: 2025-11-10
Notes: expressed interest in index ops background
vault_state.raw/profile.md:
target_roles:
  - Investment Product Strategy
  - Index Portfolio Manager

expected_behavior: Reads firms-contacts.md for Sarah Kim's context. Reads profile.md for positioning. Drafts LinkedIn message that is ≤300 characters, warm, and references the CFA event or her specific interest. Shows character count. Ends with approval gate asking yes/edit/discard. Does NOT send or save the message without explicit yes.
assertions: reads contact entry for Sarah Kim from firms-contacts.md
draft is 300 characters or fewer (hard limit)
shows character count alongside the draft
message references something specific (event, her work, or role angle) — not generic
ends with 'Send this message? (yes / edit / discard)'
does not log to firms-contacts.md or send anything without yes

name: Log application appends to pipeline and saves JD
prompt: I just applied to BlackRock for their VP Index Strategy role on LinkedIn.

vault_state.wiki/pipeline.md:
# Pipeline
| Firm | Role | Status | Applied | Last update | Channel | CV code | Contact | JD saved | Notes |

expected_behavior: Collects all fields (firm, role, date, channel, CV version, contact). Asks user to paste JD or skip. Shows a preview row before writing. Asks 'Log this application? (yes / no)'. Only writes after explicit yes. Saves JD to wiki/jd-log/ if provided.
assertions: collects firm, role, date, channel, CV version in one message
asks whether user wants to save JD
shows a preview pipeline row before writing
asks 'Log this application? (yes / no)' before any write
does not write to pipeline.md without yes
saves JD to wiki/jd-log/{firm}-{role}-{date}.md if provided

name: Proactive check surfaces overdue sessions before routing

vault_state.wiki/sessions.md:
| weekly-review | 2026-03-18 | 7 days | overdue |
| linkedin-session | never | 60 days | overdue |
| experience-bank-session | 2026-01-10 | 90 days | overdue |
| cv-strategy-session | 2026-03-25 | 30 days | overdue |

expected_behavior: Before asking what the user wants to do, skill checks sessions.md and surfaces overdue sessions. Limits to at most 2–3 suggestions to avoid overwhelming. Then asks what the user would like to do.
assertions: reads wiki/sessions.md in Step 1b before routing
surfaces at least 1 overdue session with days-since information
surfaces no more than 3 items total in proactive check
after surfacing, asks what the user would like to do — does not auto-start a session

name: Weekly review computes stats and flags bottleneck
prompt: Run my weekly job search review.

vault_state.wiki/pipeline.md:
| Apex Partners | VP Strategy | applied | 2026-04-14 | 2026-04-14 | LinkedIn | A | — | yes | |
| Nexus Capital | Senior Analyst | applied | 2026-04-15 | 2026-04-15 | Referral | A | Jane Doe | yes | |
| Summit Advisors | Director | applied | 2026-04-16 | 2026-04-16 | Company portal | B | — | no | |
| Meridian AM | Senior Analyst | screening | 2026-04-17 | 2026-04-18 | LinkedIn | A | — | yes | |

expected_behavior: Reads pipeline.md and filters for the past 7 days. Computes applications (3), responses (1), response rate (33%), interviews (0). Surfaces bottleneck if response rate is low. Asks for next-week goals. Asks before logging session to sessions.md.
assertions: reads wiki/pipeline.md and filters to past 7 days
outputs a metrics table with applications, responses, response rate, interviews
flags a bottleneck based on conversion data
asks 'Goals for next week?' before logging
asks confirmation before updating wiki/sessions.md
does not write to sessions.md without yes

name: Cover letter drafts 3-paragraph letter and saves after approval
prompt: Write me a cover letter for the Index Strategy VP role at Summit Advisors.

vault_state.raw/profile.md: gap_narrative: My previous role was eliminated in a company restructuring — I have documentation and strong references.
vault_state.wiki/jd-log/summit-advisors-index-strate:
Role: VP Index Strategy
Firm: Summit Advisors
Requirements: 7+ years index management, client-facing, team leadership...

expected_behavior: Loads JD from jd-log/ automatically. Reads experience-bank for top 2–3 accomplishments relevant to the JD. Reads profile.md for gap narrative. Drafts 3-paragraph cover letter: hook → evidence → close. No filler phrases. Offers to save. Does not save without yes. Offers ATS review after.
assertions: loads JD from wiki/jd-log/ without asking user to paste
uses only content sourced from experience-bank.md — no invented claims
draft has exactly 3 paragraphs: hook, evidence, close
includes gap narrative from profile.md if gap exists
no filler openers ('I am writing to express...')
asks 'Save this cover letter? (yes / edit / discard)' before writing
saves to outputs/cover-letters/ only after yes
offers ATS review after

name: Networking strategy maps contacts to targets and produces ranked list
prompt: Let's do a networking strategy session.

vault_state.raw/firms-contacts.md:
## Tier 1
### Apex Partners (no contacts)
### Summit Advisors
- Jane Doe, Director — warm, met at conference

## Tier 2
### Meridian AM
- Bob Chen, VP — lukewarm, mutual LinkedIn connection
### Nexus Capital (no contacts)
vault_state.wiki/pipeline.md: | Summit Advisors | Director | applied | 2026-04-16 | 2026-04-16 | Company portal | B | — | no | |
vault_state.raw/profile.md: [populated with target roles and tier preferences]

expected_behavior: Reads firms-contacts.md and pipeline.md. Maps each Tier 1 and Tier 2 firm to warm/lukewarm/cold. Identifies firms with no contacts. Produces a ranked outreach sequence (warm first, then lukewarm, then cold). Asks before saving to firms-contacts.md. Logs session to sessions.md after confirmation.
assertions: reads firms-contacts.md and classifies each target firm as warm/lukewarm/cold
identifies Tier 1 firms with no contacts as needing a cold strategy
outputs a ranked outreach sequence table with timing and suggested angle
asks 'Save sequencing plan to firms-contacts.md? (yes / skip)'
does not write without yes
logs session in sessions.md after confirmation
